judge_result.short_rationale: It includes clothing removal and washing, but misses the required immediate call to a physician/poison center for any skin exposure. It wrongly adds eye-exposure instructions in a skin-only incident and delays escalation until symptoms appear, which is unsafe and not source-grounded.
